## Checklist

- [ ] `vendor/bin/phpunit` passes locally with clean output
- [ ] `README.md` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `Unreleased`
- [ ] Change stays within scope (write operations only; no premature configuration)
